summary: Iteration 67: Tenant Management Module Test COMPLETE. All 18 backend API tests PASSED. Edit tenant (status & config), Delete tenant with guardrails, RBAC protection, and Audit logging all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All tenant management endpoints are properly secured with RBAC (owner/super_admin only)
Delete guardrail correctly detects transactions (2,415 in ocb_titan) and warns user
Audit logging working correctly - all updates recorded with user email, timestamp, and details
Dry run delete (confirm_delete=false) returns transaction counts before actual deletion
seed_data_creation: Test tenant created and deleted during testing (ocb_test_tenant_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant Management module fully tested. All CRUD operations verified: List, Create, Edit Status, Edit Config, Delete (with guardrail). Audit logs being written to tenant's audit_logs collection.

list_tenants.GET /api/tenant/tenants: PASS - Returns 6 tenants with blueprint v2.0.0

create_tenant.POST /api/tenant/tenants: PASS - Creates tenant with full blueprint initialization

edit_tenant.PATCH /api/tenant/tenants/{id}: PASS - Updates config (tenant_type, currency, timezone, ai_enabled)
edit_tenant.invalid_status_validation: PASS - Returns 422 for invalid status values

delete_tenant.DELETE ?confirm_delete=false (dry run): PASS - Returns transaction counts without deleting
delete_tenant.DELETE ?confirm_delete=true (actual): PASS - Deletes tenant and creates backup
delete_tenant.guardrail_working: PASS - ocb_titan shows 2,415 transactions with warning

audit_logging.update_tenant_status: PASS - Logged with action, user_email, timestamp, details
audit_logging.update_tenant: PASS - Logged with all updated fields

additional_endpoints.GET /api/tenant/health/{db_name}: PASS - Returns health status and issues
additional_endpoints.GET /api/tenant/blueprint-status: PASS - Returns blueprint version and required collections
additional_endpoints.POST /api/tenant/tenants/{id}/sync-bluep: PASS - Syncs tenant to current blueprint
additional_endpoints.GET /api/tenant/deleted/history: PASS - Returns 6 deleted tenants with history

delete_guardrail_verification.warning_message: PERHATIAN: Penghapusan tenant bersifat PERMANEN dan tidak dapat dikembalikan!
